title: Chinese-style school and home: Unofficial version
description: This mod can make your classrooms and buildings more realistic.
body:
# overview
The School Module is a decoration mod that is close to life, providing you with some school-related building materials and some interesting props for the occasion.
# Notes
The mod is unoffical version.The original author gave up this mod and she made a different school mod.the mod will add things from the"new school mod"soon.
This mod will force the use of GeckoLibMOD in version 0.1.14.0.

The mod support Forge 1.20.1 and neoforge 1.20.4,1.21.1,but any version below 1.20 won't be support.
This mod support English and Chinese only!

If the last page moves, it is a major version update, and if it is marked with TC, it is a minor update

If there is a bug, please report it to the author.
We highly recommend that you use Oculus and do not use Optifine.

This module is likely to be linked, and the textbook module can be used, and if you want to download it, please click on the following link:[https://www.mcmod.cn/class/15197.html]
(https://www.mcmod.cn/class/15197.html)(The link is Chinese Simplified, please translate it yourself.Non Chinese Mainland users may not be able to access)
I'm going to push the mod straight to version 1.0 and there won't be 0.2, 0.3 and so on

If you want to transfer this module page, just keep the original author link on the transferred module page and indicate that this module may not be compatible with your language version.
# Known bugs
Mods may have issues with materials being transparent or openable windows being unusually transparent in partial light and shadow

Partially incompatible light and shadow

derivative 24.4.14

SEUS full range

The next version will fix this bug, but it might reduce something that wasn’t actually broken for you.
# added things
- Blackboard and whiteboard
- Electronic whiteboard
- Computers
- Balance
- Printers
- Projector(many bugs on it)
- Chalk launcher(look like guns)
- Windows
- Laptops
- Loudspeakers
- Desks and chairs
- Many kinds of blackboard
- and more...

# Thanks
MCMOD Imposter
